name: mustream
description: A beautiful Electron Desktop application to stream your Spotify playlists completely free via YouTube audio

scripts.build:all: bun build ./bin/musync.js --compile --target bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/mustream-mac-intel && bun build ./bin/musync.js --compile --target bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/mustream-mac-arm && bun build ./bin/musync.js --compile --target bun-windows-x64 --outfile dist/mustream-windows.exe && bun build ./bin/musync.js --compile --target bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/mustream-linux
